SMM, Content & Growth (Plug & Play)
Things to keep in mind:
With this service, the biggest issue you’re always going to face is keeping client
expectations in check. Just remember that there is no clear cut way to measure ROI
so you have to sell off of:
- Social Growth
- Convenience
- Brand Equity
There are students in this course making $50,000+ a month by doing this, but
they’ve managed to set client expectations clearly and streamline the process.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Content:
If you’re just doing SMM/Growth, then the client will send you their assets ahead of
time for you to use.
If your service offering includes content, then you’ll need to find a shoot day. When
we use to be a creative agency, I had one shoot day per month with my client and
then I spent the next day editing it all.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Organisation:
Organising and arranging the posts AHEAD of time is absolutely crucial. First of all,
the client must know what you’re posting before you actually make it LIVE on their
socials. Making sure that they’re in the loop on stuff like this is critical.
In order to make life easier, we used to use a content planner. You can access it
HERE.
Then in Google Drive, we organise their client folder in a very specific way to ensure
that nothing is lost. I shot a full instructional video on it that you can access HERE.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 2 --

SMM, Content & Growth (Plug & Play)
Facebook Growth:
Honestly, Facebook page like growth does absolutely nothing for the business
owner. That said, they’re just excited to see the numbers go up and it does help
brand equity to have at least 5,000 page likes or more.
You should be spending $10 a week on cheap page like growth by running a
promotion. You want to run the ads to varied countries so the client isn’t seeing
names that all appear to be the same.
Locations: Poland, Mexico, Malaysia, Brazil
For the actual creative/copy for the post - I recommend you do something sitational.
I’ve shot a video that’ll walk you through the entire process. Click HERE
Instagram Growth:
The best way to grow an Instagram easily is through a simple automated Instagram
bot. I personally recommend InstaZood
You want to make sure that you’re never following more than 500 people on your
client’s account. You can set this limit on the software.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
